lost_token.title: Recover the Lost Token
lost_token.summary: Win the Lost Token back from Cabinet 07.
lost_token.details: Mira says Cabinet 07 has the Lost Token. Recover it from Cabinet 07 on the ArcadeHub main floor, then return to Mira at the ticket counter.

broken_high_score.title: Broken High Score
broken_high_score.summary: Use the BROKEN SCORE cabinet in Cabinet Row.
broken_high_score.details: The score claims the target is 999999, but the display is broken. Restore the real record before using the Truth Filter.

truth_filter.title: Truth Filter
truth_filter.summary: See Mr. Byte in Cabinet Row, then the Filter.
truth_filter.details: The Lost Token woke something. Talk to Mr. Byte, read the Logs across the row, and use the Truth Filter to sort the false records.

circuit_soda.title: Route the Signal
circuit_soda.summary: See Vendo in Snack Alcove, then Circuit Soda.
circuit_soda.details: The Truth Filter recovered a second token, but the signal is still misrouted. Talk to Vendo in Snack Alcove, then use Circuit Soda.

prize_counter_secret.title: Prize Echo Ascent
prize_counter_secret.summary: Follow eighteen prize echoes across both rails.
prize_counter_secret.details: Use the shelf beside Pip. Recover the eighteen numbered echo tags, open all three rail locks, then bring the Echo Token back to Pip.

lost_shift_file.title: Closing Shift Echoes
lost_shift_file.location: Arcade Hub, Cabinet Row, Snack Alcove
lost_shift_file.summary: Ask Mira, then follow what feels familiar.
lost_shift_file.details: Begin with Mira. Follow the thread that surfaces in Cabinet Row and Snack Alcove, then tell Gus what you found.

static_service_run.title: Static Service Run
static_service_run.summary: See Gus in Maintenance Hall about the power.
static_service_run.details: The closing-shift echoes point toward a dead service line. Talk to Gus in Maintenance Hall, then restore its power through Static Service Run.

maintenance_sync.title: Maintenance Sync
maintenance_sync.summary: Run Maintenance Sync with Gus in Maintenance.
maintenance_sync.details: Service power is restored. Talk to Gus in Maintenance Hall, then use Maintenance Sync to line up the Staff Door signals.

staff_corridor.title: Enter the Staff Corridor
staff_corridor.summary: Take the north exit to the Staff Room.
staff_corridor.details: Gus stabilized Staff Access. Take the north exit from Staff Corridor to the Staff Room and inspect the archive desk.

security_tape_assembly.title: Assemble the Security Tape
security_tape_assembly.summary: Inspect the archive desk for the Security Tape.
security_tape_assembly.details: The archive desk holds the damaged tape. Assemble it before retracing the Final Night.

final_night_walk.title: Final Night Walk
final_night_walk.summary: Use the archive desk to trace the Final Night.
final_night_walk.details: The security tape is assembled, but the memory remains unstable. Trace the closing route from the archive desk before confronting the Memory Echo.

memory_echo.title: Stabilize the Memory Echo
memory_echo.summary: Use the archive desk to open Memory Echo.
memory_echo.details: The Final Night route is stable. Open Memory Echo from the archive desk to hold both signals long enough for the terminal to respond.

after_hours_archive.title: Night Ledger
after_hours_archive.summary: Balance the scrolling audit and return its token.
after_hours_archive.details: Cross the ledger thresholds, explore the sub-ledger, recover twelve numbered stamps and three Ledger Keys, then reach MINT.

staff_records_chain.title: Staff Records Chain
staff_records_chain.location: Cabinet Row, Maintenance Hall, Staff Corridor
staff_records_chain.details: The arcade preserved small system notes around the Final Night. They deepen the identity mystery without blocking the required route.

post_reveal_witness_route.title: Post-Reveal Witness Route
post_reveal_witness_route.owner: Mira / Gus / Vendo / Mr. Byte / Cabinet 07
post_reveal_witness_route.location: ArcadeHub, Cabinet Row, Maintenance Hall, Snack Alcove
post_reveal_witness_route.details: Pixel Haven's witnesses remember different parts of the protagonist's life. Roxy and Pip add reflections if the player met them.
